name: Apple-Mint Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, combine the apple juice, mint leaves, lemon juice, and pectin over medium-high heat.
2. Bring to a rolling boil.
3. Add the sugar.
4. Stirring constantly, bring to a rolling boil again and continue boiling for 1 minute.
5. Remove from heat; skim off any foam that forms.
6. Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into clean bowls, discarding the mint leaves.
7. Tint the jelly green using food coloring if desired.
8. Pour the cooled jelly into heat-resistant jars with tight-fitting lids.
9. Store in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Yield: about 3 pints of jelly
